results.title: 'You lost:' Clifton Park town attorney settles 6-month legal battle
results.description: The Clifton Park Town Board has reached an agreement with the Civil Service Employees Association after months of legal battling.

results.title: When Loss Raises Questions: How Wrongful Death Lawyers Help Uncover the Truth
results.description: The sudden loss of a loved one is one of the most painful experiences a family can face. When that loss occurs because of another person’s negligence, carelessness, or wrongful actions, families often experience not only grief but also uncertainty. They may have questions about what happened, who was responsible, and whether anything could have been done to prevent the tragedy.
